operations.summary: List available agents for delegation or messaging.

includeAll.description: When true, return all visible agents (ignores allowlist/denylist filtering).

operations.summary: Send a message to another agent (sync or async).

agentId.description: ID of the target agent to message.

content.description: Message content to send to the target agent.

session.description: Session resolution strategy: "latest", "create", "latest-or-create" (default), or an explicit session id.

mode.description: When "sync", wait for a response. When "async", return immediately.

timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for sync mode (default: 300).

sessionConfig.description: Optional session configuration overrides (model, thinking, workingDir, skills) applied when a new session is created.

model.description: Model to use for the new session.

thinking.description: Thinking level for the new session.

workingDir.description: Working directory for the new session (must be an absolute path).

skills.description: Instruction skill ids to select for the new session.

operations.summary: List working directory subfolders for an agent.

agentId.description: Agent id to resolve working dir roots for.
